comment: Committed gzip baseline for the build gate byte-true ratchet (tools/build-check.mjs): the bundle fails when measured gzip bytes exceed baseline × ratioCap — long before the absolute budgets in tools/bundle-budget.json (~3x headroom) would notice. Bytes are hardware-independent, so this check is deterministic everywhere, agent time included. Regenerate ONLY via `pnpm perf:baseline` after a DELIBERATE size change and commit the diff for review — the file is write-guard-protected. installerBudgetBytes bounds the nightly Windows NSIS artifact (debug build embedding the ~150 MB offline WebView2; a coarse bundled-dependency canary) — the first nightly prints the real size; ratchet it DOWN in a reviewed commit.
